---
title: "example_1 Report"
format: html
params:
  batch_value: "example_1"  # must match value in generate_batch_qmds.R
  batch_name: "example_batch"
---

<!-- 
This is the template that will be generated for
each batch_value (research cruise).
-->

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(here)
library(glue)
```

```{r get-data}
#| code-summary: Load processed and interpolated CTD data for this cruise
source(here(glue("{params$batch_name}/getData.R")))

data <- getData(params$batch_value)
ctd <- data$ctd_binned
field <- data$oxygen_field
head(ctd)
```

## CTD summary

```{r ctd-summary}
#| code-summary: Cast and depth-bin summary
data.frame(
  casts = length(unique(ctd$cast_id)),
  depth_bins = length(unique(ctd$depth_bin_m)),
  oxygen_range_umol_kg = range(ctd$oxygen_umol_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

## Interpolated oxygen field

```{r field-preview}
#| code-summary: Preview gridded DIVAnd output
if (is.null(field)) {
  "Interpolated field not found. Run `make interpolate` first."
} else {
  head(field)
}
```
